OBJECTION HEARING JAN-06-2012 (610)
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR JUL-16-2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF OHIO STATE LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT OF INTERPLEADER AND FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANTED EXCEPT THAT PLAINTIFF IS AWARDED $3000 IN FEES AND COSTS. NOTWITHSTANDING THE EXPERTISE OF ITS COUNSEL, GIVEN THE MODEST AMOUNT INTERPLEADED, PLAINTIFF WAS UNDER AN OBLIGATION TO KEEP FEES AND COSTS TO THE SMALLEST SUM POSSIBLE. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: TEANNA WARD, CSR # 11918

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2012 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2012 Continued To Oct-23-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-25-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-21-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2012 Set For Trial On Jul-16-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Motion For Judgment Of Interpleader
Off Calendar Jan-17-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
PLAINTIFF OHIO STATE LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion For Judgment Of Interpleader and for attorneys' fees and costs is Granted except that plaintiff is awarded $3000 in fees and costs. Notwithstanding the expertise of its counsel, given the modest amount interpleaded, plaintiff was under an obligation to keep fees and costs to the smallest sum possible. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR # 11918 =302/HEK

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2011 Set For Trial On Apr-09-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
